home.heroTitle: Genuine TATA Service, Whenever Your Fleet Needs It
home.heroSubtitle: Book a service in minutes at any of our island-wide centres — certified technicians, genuine parts and fast turnaround for your TATA trucks, buses and pickups.
home.packagesSubtitle: Transparent pricing for routine maintenance — choose the package that fits your vehicle.
home.why1Body: Service centres across Colombo, Kandy, Kurunegala and Galle keep your fleet moving.
home.why2Body: 100% genuine parts backed by manufacturer warranty.
home.why3Body: Dedicated fleet servicing, pickup & delivery, and on-site support for businesses.
home.why4Body: Flexible leasing and finance options through our partner banks.
home.serviceCtaTitle: Keep your fleet on the road.
home.aboutSnippet: LCM is the authorised dealer and service partner for TATA commercial vehicles in Sri Lanka, supporting fleet operators with sales, service, parts and finance island-wide.
